## edu-cli chapter create

Create a new chapter (requires --syllabus-id)

```
edu-cli chapter create [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help               help for create
      --name string        Chapter name (required)
      --parent-id uint     Parent chapter ID (0 = root)
      --syllabus-id uint   Syllabus ID (required)
```
